name: Pump Trip (Pressure Drop)
description: Pump failure at pipe inlet causing pressure drop. 20km pipe, 0.6m diameter, initial flow 0.3 m³/s. Inlet pressure drops from 4MPa to 2MPa over 10 seconds.

output.description: Simulates pump coast-down. Inlet pressure drops from 4MPa to 2MPa, pressure wave propagates downstream, reflecting at the outlet (constant flow).
